⚗️ ALCHEMICAL BREWERY ⚗️

Concoct powerful potions from souls and rare materials — or fuse two together for something far greater.

🔮

Fusion Cauldron

EXPERIMENTAL

Combine two potions from your shelf into something far more powerful. Market potions fuse into legendary results. Fusing consumes both potions.

🔮 Select Potion for Slot

🧪 YOUR POTION SHELF

📜 AVAILABLE RECIPES

⚔️ INVENTORY & EQUIPMENT ⚔️

Equip powerful items from your Abyssal Caches. Each slot grants unique bonuses to your soul harvest.

🛡️ EQUIPPED

🎒 STORED ITEMS

😈 DEMONIC MINIONS 😈

Enslave creatures from the abyss to passively harvest souls. Each level increases their power.

🗺️ MINION EXPEDITIONS 🗺️

Deploy your minions on dangerous missions across the abyss. While on expedition, their levels are temporarily reduced.

⚡ Abyssal Breaches may appear mid-expedition — enter them for bonus rewards.

Available Expeditions

🗺️

Party Power 0 / 0
Assemble your party below

Deploy Minions

🔥 THE SOUL-FORGE 🔥

Sacrifice three items of the same rarity into the forge. The flames will reforge them into something far more powerful.

⚠ The three items consumed are chosen at random from your inventory.

💎 ABYSSAL ARTIFACTS 💎

Spend Abyssal Shards or Dark Essence on powerful permanent upgrades. Each artifact scales infinitely with level.

🔮 DARK RITUALS 🔮

Channel forbidden power through blood and sacrifice. Each ritual costs souls and enters a cooldown before it can be performed again.

🌐 MAP OF THE UNDERWORLDS 🌐

Each realm you unlock grants a permanent bonus and new minions. Your current realm determines your world bonus.

⚔️ ABYSSAL ARENA ⚔️

Challenge other Soul Collectors in tactical combat. Set your defense formation, then raid your rivals.

    ⚔️ THE ABYSSAL GAUNTLET ⚔️

        ⚔️ SOUL PACTS ⚔️

        Forge a blood alliance with up to 3 other collectors. Every active pact member empowers your soul harvest.

        Your Alliance

        🎲 Pact Blessing
        Roll a random buff now (30 min cooldown) or wait for the auto-blessing every 2 hours.
        Possible buffs (1 of 20 rolled randomly): 💥 Soul Surge 🌊 Soul Flood 🔮 Void Resonance 🌑 Dark Tide 🌾 Dark Harvest 🔊 Abyssal Echo 👁️ Hand of Doom 🩸 Blood Pact ⚫ Void Covenant ✨ Soul Ascendancy ⚡ Soul Overload 👑 The Great Harvest 🔥 Pact Frenzy 😈 Abyssal Wrath 💜 Essence Tide 🌙 Dark Bounty 🛡 Void Shield 💸 Infernal Discount 💰 Abyssal Fortune 💎 Shard Storm
        🔱

        Forge a New Pact

        Become the founding member. Choose a name that strikes fear.

        🤝

        Join an Alliance

        Know the name of an existing pact? Pledge your soul to their cause.

        ✨ ASCENSION ✨

        Shatter your Soul Core to transcend this cycle. Your current souls, minions, upgrades, and worlds are reset — but your power echoes forward as Abyssal Shards.

        You will receive
        💎
        0
        Abyssal Shards
        Shards multiply all soul gains permanently, even after future ascensions.
        ✗ Lost on Ascension
        ✗ All Souls (current run)
        ✗ Dark Essence (unless artifacts saved some)
        ✗ All Minion Levels
        ✗ Click & Resonance Upgrades
        ✗ World Progress (re-unlock required)
        ✗ Active Rituals & Rituals Progress
        ✗ Active Potions
        ✗ Corrupted Fragments (unless banked)
        ✔ Kept after Ascension
        ✔ Abyssal Shards (+ new ones gained)
        ✔ All Artifacts & levels
        ✔ All Inventory Items & equipped gear
        ✔ Brewed Potions (shelf inventory)
        ✔ Aether & Aether Upgrades
        ✔ PvP Wins & Losses
        ✔ Proving Grounds completions
        ✔ Banked Souls & Banked Fragments
        ✔ Pact membership
        ✔ Lifetime stats (never reset)
        💡 Tip: Deposit Fragments & Souls in the Abyssal Vault before ascending to carry them forward.
        🔒
        Requires: Void Threshold world unlocked

        🌀 COLLAPSE REALITY 🌀

        You have reached the centre of all things. Tear reality apart and start again — gaining Aether, the only force that persists beyond the end of everything.

        You will receive
        🌀
        0
        Aether
        Aether unlocks permanent upgrades that survive all future resets, including Ascensions.
        ✗ Lost on Collapse
        ✗ All Souls
        ✗ Dark Essence
        ✗ Abyssal Shards
        ✗ All Minion Levels
        ✗ All Upgrades
        ✗ All Worlds & Progress
        ✗ All Artifacts & levels
        ✗ All Inventory Items
        ✗ Brewed Potions
        ✗ Active Rituals
        ✗ Corrupted Fragments
        ✗ Banked Souls & Fragments
        ✔ Kept after Collapse
        ✔ Aether (+ new Aether gained)
        ✔ Aether Upgrades
        ✔ PvP Wins & Losses
        ✔ Proving Grounds completions
        ✔ Pact membership
        ✔ Lifetime stats (never reset)
        Everything else is gone.
        Collapse is a true reset.
        ⚠ Warning: Collapse destroys everything — including Artifacts, Items, Shards and Banked Souls. Only do this when you have strong Aether Upgrades lined up.
        🔒
        Requires: Nexus of All Realities world unlocked

        ♾ Aether Upgrades

        These upgrades are permanent and survive all resets, including Collapse.
